data.content: Follow-up layout fix after the shipped regression: removed the hard 56.25% cap from the queue row overview, made the description/notes grid span the full title width with repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)), and added min-w-0/break-word guards so the title cell can still shrink on laptop widths. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
